content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Pharma (+2.5%), IT (+1.9%), Realty (+1.7%), Metals (+1.6%), Energy (+1.2%) all leading. VIX down -4.7% to 18.79 indicates risk-on. Nifty +0.57% above 24000 with strong global cues (Nasdaq +1.6%). Power/energy theme extended; book already heavy in power names so disposition is to manage existing positions, not chase.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24150
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 76.50,
      "new_target": 85.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position at -3.1% but thesis intact (strong Q4: PAT +35%, GNPA improved, PSU bank index leading). CMP 78.95 holding above S1 78.36. Loosening SL is not allowed; current SL 78.00 is too tight - actually the SL is BELOW current SL would loosen. Cancelling MODIFY - keeping HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "Correction on prior MODIFY - cannot loosen SL. Current SL 78.00 is just below CMP 78.95. Keep as is; if 78 breaks, exit triggers. Thesis (Q4 beat, PSU bank leadership) intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +6.2%. Trailing SL mandate triggered (>+4%). Current SL already at 1030 (above entry 984 = breakeven+). CMP 1045.85, want SL at 1025 trail level... but current SL 1030 is already tighter. Same values = no-op, switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "Held position at -0.5%, gold near records, geopolitical premium intact. SL 119 well below CMP 124.55 — defensive hedge for portfolio. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op identified - SL and target unchanged. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.0%, near 52-w high. Strong Q4 beat (PAT +27%, double-digit volume). SL at 1418 is just below entry — appropriate given run-up. Hold for target 1465."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "reasoning": "Position -1.7%. Q4 results in 3 days (Apr 30) — binary event. SL 2295 (~3.3% below entry) is appropriate buffer. Strong sector tailwind from Nestle beat, delivery accumulation seen. Hold through results given the favorable setup, but acknowledge gap risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 405.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op - SL and target unchanged. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.3% at fresh 52w high. SL at 405 = breakeven. Strong power sector momentum, Q4 results May 15. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry. Bearish supplementary research (SFIO probe, fraud overhang) is concerning. SL 855 (-2.6%) appropriate. Stock up 3.5% today on Q4 +331% beat — give it room to play out. Watch closely."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1770.00,
      "new_target": 1920.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Stock surged to 1804.50 (entry 1810, currently flat but intraday high 1824). SL at 1740 is ~4% wide. Tightening to 1770 (~2% below current and below today's low 1704... actually that's wider). CMP 1804, today low 1704. Setting SL at 1770 is between entry and intraday level — tightens from 1740 to 1770. Risk reduced."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY at 320.50 still open. CMP 321.50, only marginally above limit. However: power sector cluster already heavy in book (NTPC, TORNTPOWER held). Adding POWERGRID would create 3-name power cluster ~15-20% of capital — cluster risk per discipline rules. Cancel pending order."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY at 443 — CMP 452.80 has run away (+2.2% above limit), unlikely to fill. Plus same power-cluster concentration concern. Cancel."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY at 612 — CMP 617.25 above limit, may not fill. Stock at upper Bollinger band, +5% intraday after blowout Q4 — extended. Cancel to free up capital deployment for better setups."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 30,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1734.00,
      "stop_loss": 1685.00,
      "target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Transformative $11.75B Organon acquisition - top-tier biosimilars and women's health franchise globally. Pharma sector +2.5% leading market. Stock up 7% on huge volume. Entry near 1734, SL 1685 (-2.8%), target 1830 (+5.5%). RR ~1:2. Position size ~5% of capital (30 shares × 1734 = ~52k). Risk: 30×49 = 1470 = 0.15% of portfolio — well within budget. Pharma adds diversification — currently 0% pharma exposure."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Cannot loosen SL. Thesis intact, hold with current 78 SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to 1030 (above entry 984). Best-in-class HFC, GNPA<1%, target 1100 within reach."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, geopolitical premium intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1418 protects entry. Strong Q4. Hold for 1465."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 in 3 days. Sector rotation tailwind. SL provides buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven (405). Power leadership intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat day, but SFIO/SEBI overhang concerning. Watching closely; if breaks 855 SL, exit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1770.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL from 1740 to 1770 — extended +6% intraday move warrants tighter risk control. Position at breakeven."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "SUNPHARMA entry placed. Monitoring HINDZINC, TORNTPOWER, TATAPOWER for pullback re-entries (cancelled stale limits). M&MFIN intraday data corrupt — skip. SAIL/JSWSTEEL extended at 52w highs; wait for consolidation. UTIAMC, ANANTRAJ, IDFCFIRSTB noted but not actionable now. AXISBANK avoid post-miss.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 54% deployed with 8 positions. Power cluster (NTPC + TORNTPOWER) ~10% — staying disciplined by cancelling POWERGRID and TATAPOWER pending adds. FMCG cluster (NESTLE + HUL) ~16% — at limit, no more adds. Adding SUNPHARMA brings sector diversification. Win rate 9% over rolling 5d is concerning but most positions are 0 days old — too early to judge. Daily loss limit fully intact. Capital preservation focus: tightening TORNTPOWER SL, cancelling 3 unfilled orders to reduce stacking risk."
}
